word: G1499 - εἰ καί - ei kaí - i kahee - If

sections.paragraph:
- Original: εἰκαί

- Transliteration: Ei kai

- Phonetic: i kahee

- Definition:

1. even, if, although

- Origin: from G1487 and G2532

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Conjunction

- Strong's: From G1487 and G2532; if also (or even): - if (that) though.
